'''Jerrilek''' was a tropical vacation [[Planet/Legends|world]] in the [[Jerrilek system/Legends|Jerrilek system]].

==History==
Its waves covered the ruins of an extinct civilization that died out [[1,000,000 BBY]]. Most of its land mass was located at the equator in the form of archipelagos. In addition, there were two small [[Mountain/Legends|mountainous]] continents. The [[Planet/Legends|planet]] had no [[Moon/Legends|moons]] but a set of rings did [[Orbit/Legends|orbit]] the planet. A standard day on Jerrilek was relatively short, and so its inhabitants had adopted a [[Sleep/Legends|sleeping]] system in which they only slept every other night.<ref name="AJ4" />

The planet was controlled by the [[Galactic Empire/Legends|Galactic Empire]] during the [[Galactic Civil War/Legends|Galactic Civil War]] and was led by an Imperial [[Governor/Legends|governor]]. It was also the home planet of [[Admiral/Legends|Admiral]] [[Chel Dorat]] and his daughter [[Preela Dorat]] who lived in the [[City/Legends|city]] of [[Graleca]].<ref name="AJ4" />

Shortly after the [[Battle of Yavin/Legends|Battle of Yavin]], it was on Jerrilek that some [[Alliance to Restore the Republic/Legends|Rebels]], having escaped the [[Devastator/Legends|''Devastator'']], [[Mission to Graleca|rescued]] the defecting Dorat from his daughter.<ref name="AJ4" />
